notes: v1.14.39 - landing wordmark Signal Boot -> Spectral Chrome: a one-shot scramble-decode that resolves into a vertical polished-chrome fill with a single specular sweep on lock; entry only, settles dead-still (no loop). (1) CSS (.pl-hdr h1): fill swapped from the 90deg cyan/violet/magenta SPECTRUM gradient to a 180deg chrome gradient (icy highlight -> dark core -> violet/magenta sheen) with a drop-shadow filter; preserved font-family/size/weight/letter-spacing/margins. New .pl-hdr h1::after specular streak (content PHANTOM, parked off-screen at rest) sweeps once via the phanSweep keyframe when .lit is added; a prefers-reduced-motion media query stills the sweep. (2) JS phantomBoot(el): scrambles the wordmark through a GLYPHS set over 26 frames x 40ms (~1.04s), locks to PHANTOM, then adds .lit after 200ms to fire the sweep; reduced-motion guard jumps straight to lit. Wired via window load on .pl-hdr h1 in the block-0 init script. UNTOUCHED: globe, status block, subtitle, nav, ENTER_ENABLED (still false - app still holds on the globe, no auto-entry), service-worker logic. GATES: node --check 3/3 inline + sw.js PASS; four stamps lockstep v1.14.39; cache bumped; CSS <style> braces balanced 3468/3468 (+7 new rules); dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF preserved. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone - full close+reopen while ONLINE to clear SW cache): wordmark scrambles in, resolves to chrome, one specular sweep, then rests still; reduced-motion shows static chrome.
